title: vernonia vanmeelii
intro: Vernonia vanmeelii, also known as the Van Meel's Ironweed or Iron Weed, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating iron deficiency and anemia due to its high iron content. The plant's health benefits include improving blood circulation, reducing inflammation, and acting as an antioxidant. Vernonia vanmeelii is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves and flowers can be used in traditional medicine to address various health issues.
